structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Parallel Fan Control for ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode and Occupied Mode, if ventilation is per ASHRAE 62.1, the parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow setpoint equals Voz minus current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling AND Occupied Mode AND ventilation per ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start parallel fan when primary airflow < Voz - 0.5*Pfan-z; shut off when primary airflow > Voz. Set fan airflow setpoint = Voz - current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Designer Must Ensure Ventilation Compliance
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The designer must ensure that the sum of indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Designer must verify that total ventilation (fan indirect + primary air at minimum setpoint) meets Standard 62.1 requirements.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.
evidence_text: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Parallel Fan Control for ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode, if ventilation is per ASHRAE 62.1, the parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow setpoint equals Voz minus active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband AND ventilation per ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run parallel fan if active primary airflow setpoint < Voz. Set fan airflow setpoint = Voz - active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: The designer must ensure that the sum of indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating mode, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Electric Reheat Minimum Airflow Requirement
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan with electric reheat
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For systems with electric reheat, ensure that the minimum airflow provided by the parallel fan at minimum speed exceeds the minimum required airflow for the electric heater.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating AND electric reheat present
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Ensure parallel fan minimum airflow at minimum speed exceeds electric heater minimum required airflow.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: For systems with electric reheat, ensure that the minimum airflow provided by the parallel fan at minimum speed exceeds the minimum required airflow for the electric heater.

evidence_quote: For systems with electric reheat, ensure that the minimum airflow provided by the parallel fan at minimum speed exceeds the minimum required airflow for the electric heater.
evidence_text: For systems with electric reheat, ensure that the minimum airflow provided by the parallel fan at minimum speed exceeds the minimum required airflow for the electric heater.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Coil Modulation to Maintain DAT Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating coil active
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate heating coil to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint. Do not directly control heating off zone temperature control loop.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.5.4. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

evidence_quote: 5.8.5.4. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).
evidence_text: 5.8.5.4. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Damper Modulation to Maintain Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at the primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: VAV damper active
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured primary airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.5.5. The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at the primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: 5.8.5.5. The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at the primary airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: 5.8.5.5. The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at the primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm Level 3
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0

evidence_text: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
evidence_text: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Discharge Air Temperature Alarm Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan with hot-water coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON and DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating hot-water plant proven ON AND DAT < setpoint by 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Heating hot-water plant proven ON and DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low-DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan OFF and airflow sensor reading above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: 5.8.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: 5.8.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: If valve position is 0% for 15 minutes and DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Valve position 0% for 15 minutes and DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F)
